items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
My latest for @orlandosentinel.com: Summer League a success for #Magic forward Noah Penda:

“… The results were there,” he said recently. “So, it’s encouraging and it just keeps pushing you for the rest of the summer.”

More: www.orlandosentinel.com/2026/07/18/o...

media.title: Summer League a success for Magic’s Noah Penda: ‘The results were there’
media.description: Second-year Orlando Magic forward Noah Penda showcased his improved shooting and defensive versatility during three Las Vegas Summer League games.

items.title: Random POTD Adam Morrison. Star SF at Gonzaga was drafted 3rd by CHA in 06. Scored 12 ppg as a rook but was not efficient. Missed 07-08 w/ACL tear. Traded to LAL in 08-09 where he sat on a title team. Waived in 2010 & played briefly abroad. Now, like everyone else, has a pod.

items.title: That Spain squad has multiple guys who have now won Nations League, Euros, the World Cup, and a silver medal at the Olympics. All in just five years. Insanely impressive. Could have easily had four major wins. Not to mention the UEFA youth titles they have won, as well.

Dallas Mavericks after trading for Zaccharie Risacher. He's a little more likely to get his $17.4 million team option for 2027-28 picked up with this trade.

They still have $7 million remaining of their Anthony Davis trade exception.

They're out of second-round picks to trade.
